title: NULL is not allowed in CASE
poc: select CASE WHEN 1=1 THEN 1 ELSE NULL END;

select CASE WHEN 1=1 THEN 1 else cast(null as int)
 end;
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_case (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value INT, description VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO test_case (id, value, description) VALUES (1, 1, 'Test case with NULL in CASE');
SELECT CASE WHEN value IS NULL THEN 'Value is NULL' ELSE 'Value is NOT NULL' END AS null_check FROM test_case;
SELECT CASE WHEN value = 1 THEN NULL ELSE value END AS case_test FROM test_case;
SELECT CASE WHEN id = 1 THEN CAST(NULL AS INT) ELSE value END AS case_with_cast FROM test_case;
